attention3.ptxt: DRL function can also be selected by configuration change of SUZUKI scan tool.

s1.ptxt: Perform Steps a) through f) described below within 15 seconds after Step 1).

s2.ptxt: Turn lighting switch to OFF position.
Repeat Steps a) and b) 4 times.
Turn lighting switch to OFF position.
Repeat Steps d) and e) 4 times.

s1.ptxt: When Step 2) is completed, the mode changes automatically. Warning buzzer (in combination meter) sounds by the specified number for each mode as follows.

item.ptxt: Changed from “Non-operable” mode to “Operable” mode: Buzzer sounds twice.
Changed from “Operable” mode to “Non-operable” mode: Buzzer sounds once.
